description: Multi-turn: create connector -> subscribe topic -> list subscriptions -> unsubscribe (covers `heramind connector subscribe` + `subscriptions` + `unsubscribe`; previously 0 coverage). Note: subscribe/unsubscribe/subscriptions operate on the embedded broker globally — they take only --topic, no connector id.

turns.user: Add an MQTT broker: name sub-broker, host 10.0.0.50.
Subscribe to topic 'env/temp/#' on the embedded broker.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `heramind connector create --name sub-broker --host 10.0.0.50`, parses id
Turn 2: Agent runs `heramind connector subscribe --topic 'env/temp/#'` (subscribe takes only --topic, no connector id)
Turn 3: Agent runs `heramind connector subscriptions` (no id arg)
expectations.overall: Turns 2-4 must use the correct no-id syntax; subscribe/unsubscribe operate globally on the embedded broker, not per-connector
